title: Windows Maintenance manual tasks
description: Things this tool cannot automate and must surface for a human to check/update. They are printed at the end of every run.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema, so editors validate the file as you edit it.

manualTasks.description: The manual checks to surface at the end of a run.

name.description: The thing to check manually, e.g. "Microsoft Store" or "MSI X670E BIOS".

category.description: Heading the item is grouped under in the end-of-run output, e.g. "Updates". Defaults to "Other" when omitted.

url.description: Optional link to where the update can be found or checked. Omit for items with no obvious URL.
